entities.name: Context Engineering
entities.context: A system that operates at three levels to manage AI interactions.

entities.name: Conversation-level tactics
entities.context: The first level of context engineering, which is portable but ephemeral.

entities.name: Environment/product-level persistence
entities.context: The second level of context engineering, which is persistent but local.

entities.name: Pipeline-level external integration
entities.context: The third level of context engineering, which connects AI to the outside world.

relationships.context: Conversation-level tactics are a component of context engineering.
Environment/product-level persistence is a component of context engineering.
Pipeline-level external integration is a component of context engineering.
